series_metadata.series_description: The Records Retention Schedules are created by the Legal Division’s RIM Unit and used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition. The Retention Schedules are for the sections of BWC and have been approved for use.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain the work product and schedule until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer maintained, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain the work product and schedule until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series is no longer maintained, and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
